metadata.title: Advanced Canvas
metadata.description: 高级画布本地化和调整
metadata.author: Machine丶Yu

ast.name: error
ast.source: Style attribute is missing the "key" property
ast.target: 样式属性缺少 "key" 属性

ast.name: error
ast.source: Style attribute is missing the "label" property
ast.target: 样式属性缺少 "label" 属性

ast.name: error
ast.source: Style attribute is missing the "options" property or it is not an array
ast.target: 样式属性缺少 "options" 属性或它不是一个数组

ast.name: error
ast.source: Style attribute is missing a default option (option with a "value" of null)
ast.target: 样式属性缺少默认选项（"value" 为 null 的选项）

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid JSON, repairing through Advanced Canvas:
ast.target: 无效的 JSON，正通过 Advanced Canvas 修复：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the file format to export the canvas as.
ast.target: 选择画布导出的文件格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Higher pixel ratios result in higher resolution images but also larger file sizes.
ast.target: 较高的像素比例会生成更高分辨率的图像，但文件也会更大。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will not include the fonts in the exported SVG. This will make the SVG file smaller.
ast.target: 导出的 SVG 中将不包含字体。这会使 SVG 文件更小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will add an Obsidian + Advanced Canvas logo to the bottom left.
ast.target: 这将在左下角添加一个 Obsidian + Advanced Canvas 的图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will obscure any text on your canvas.
ast.target: 这将模糊化画布上的所有文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will make the background of the image transparent.
ast.target: 这将使图像的背景变为透明。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Requires a reload to take effect.

ast.name: warn
ast.target: LinkSuggestionsPatcher：未找到建议管理器 (suggest manager)。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Imported edge is not yet loaded :(

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Reload obsidian to apply the changes.
ast.target: 重载 Obsidian 以应用更改。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Metadata node not found or version mismatch. Should have been migrated (but wasn't).
ast.target: 未找到元数据节点或版本不匹配。本应迁移（但未迁移）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No start node found. Please mark a node as a start node trough the popup menu.
ast.target: 未找到起始节点。请通过弹出菜单将节点标记为起始节点。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Copied wikilink to node to clipboard.
ast.target: 已将节点的 wikilink 复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Updating edges from portals is not supported yet.
ast.target: 尚不支持从传送门更新连线。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Creating edges with both ends in portals are not supported yet.
ast.target: 尚不支持两端都在传送门中的连线创建。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Core plugin "Properties view" was not found or isn't enabled. Enable it and restart Obsidian.
ast.target: 未找到核心插件“属性视图 (Properties view)”或未启用。请启用它并重启 Obsidian。

ast.name: description
ast.source: General settings of the Advanced Canvas plugin.
ast.target: Advanced Canvas 插件的常规设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The type of node that will be created when double clicking on the canvas.
ast.target: 在画布上双击时创建的节点类型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, new nodes will be aligned to the grid.
ast.target: 启用后，新节点将对齐到网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default dimensions of a text node.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default dimensions of a file node.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The minimum size (either width or height) of a node.
ast.target: 节点的最小尺寸（宽度或高度）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The maximum width of a node. Set to -1 for no limit.
ast.target: 节点的最大宽度。设置为 -1 表示无限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the font size of e.g. group node titles and edge labels will not increase when zooming out.
ast.target: 启用后，缩小时（例如）组节点标题和连线标签的字体大小将不会增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add more commands to the canvas.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the canvas will zoom to the cloned node.
ast.target: 启用后，画布将缩放至克隆的节点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The margin between the cloned node and the source node.
ast.target: 克隆节点与源节点之间的边距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The step size for expanding the node.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make .canvas files compatible with the backlinks and outgoing links feature and show the connections in the graph view.
ast.target: 使 .canvas 文件兼容反向链接和出链功能，并在关系图视图中显示这些连接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the file search will be done using the native Obsidian file search.
ast.target: 启用后，将使用 Obsidian 原生文件搜索进行搜索。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically create edges between file nodes based their frontmatter links.
ast.target: 根据其 frontmatter 链接在文件节点之间自动创建连线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The frontmatter key to fetch the outgoing edges from. (Keep the default to ensure best compatibility.)
ast.target: 用于获取出链的 frontmatter 键。（保留默认值以确保最佳兼容性。）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 创建通往其他画布的传送门。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, edges into disabled portals will be shown.
ast.target: 启用后，将显示进入已禁用传送门的连线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Group nodes can be collapsed and expanded to keep the canvas organized.
ast.target: 组节点可以折叠和展开，以保持画布整洁。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, a group that is collapsed show its border while dragging a node.
ast.target: 启用后，拖动节点时，已折叠的组将显示其边框。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Combine all style attributes of Advanced Canvas in a single dropdown.
ast.target: 将 Advanced Canvas 的所有样式属性合并到一个下拉菜单中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Style your nodes with different shapes and borders.
ast.target: 使用不同的形状和边框设置节点样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add custom style settings for nodes. (Go to GitHub for more information)
ast.target: 为节点添加自定义样式设置。（访问 GitHub 了解更多信息）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default color of a text node. The default range is from 0 to 6, where 0 is no color. The range can be extended by using the Custom Colors feature of Advanced Canvas.
ast.target: 文本节点的默认颜色。默认范围是 0 到 6，其中 0 表示无颜色。可以通过使用 Advanced Canvas 的“自定义颜色”功能来扩展该范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Style your edges with different path styles.
ast.target: 使用不同的路径样式设置连线样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add custom style settings for edges. (Go to GitHub for more information)
ast.target: 为连线添加自定义样式设置。（访问 GitHub 了解更多信息）

ast.name: description
ast.source: When creating a new edge by dragging from a node, the edge will inherit the color of the node it is dragged from.
ast.target: 通过从节点拖拽创建新连线时，连线将继承其拖拽源节点的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default color of an edge. The default range is from 0 to 6, where 0 is no color. The range can be extended by using the Custom Colors feature of Advanced Canvas.
ast.target: 连线的默认颜色。默认范围是 0 到 6，其中 0 表示无颜色。可以通过使用 Advanced Canvas 的“自定义颜色”功能来扩展该范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default line direction of an edge.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the edge style will be updated while dragging an edge.
ast.target: 启用后，拖动连线时会实时更新连线样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the square path's corners will be rounded.
ast.target: 启用后，方形路径的拐角将被倒圆角处理。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the A* path style will allow diagonal paths.
ast.target: 启用后，A* 路径样式将允许对角线路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the A* path style will be rounded.
ast.target: 启用后，A* 路径样式将被倒圆角处理。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Floating edges are automatically placed on the most suitable side of the node.
ast.target: 浮动连线会自动放置在节点最合适的一侧。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow floating edges creation by dragging the edge over the target node without placing it over a specific side connection point. (If disabled, floating edges can only be created and used by other Advanced Canvas features.)
ast.target: 允许通过将连线拖动到目标节点上方（而不放置在特定侧面连接点上）来创建浮动连线。（如果禁用，则只能通过 Advanced Canvas 的其他功能创建和使用浮动连线。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the "from" side of the edge will always be floating.
ast.target: 启用后，连线的“起始 (from)”端将始终浮动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Flip the direction of edges using the popup menu.
ast.target: 使用弹出菜单翻转连线的方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a presentation from your canvas.
ast.target: 根据画布创建演示文稿。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If turned off, you can still set the start node using the corresponding command.
ast.target: 如果关闭，您仍然可以使用相应的命令设置起始节点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default dimensions of a slide.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The padding of the slide when wrapping the canvas in a slide.
ast.target: 将画布包裹在幻灯片中时，幻灯片的内边距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the viewport will be reset to the original position after the presentation ends.
ast.target: 启用后，演示结束后视口将重置回原始位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, you can use the arrow keys to change slides in presentation mode.
ast.target: 启用后，在演示模式下可以使用方向键切换幻灯片。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the canvas will zoom to the slide without padding.
ast.target: 启用后，画布缩放到幻灯片时将不包含内边距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the zoom will not be clamped while presenting.
ast.target: 启用后，演示期间的缩放将不受限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, presentations automatically request fullscreen. Disable to keep Obsidian windowed during presentations.
ast.target: 启用后，演示文稿会自动请求全屏。禁用此项可在演示期间保持 Obsidian 窗口化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The duration of the slide transition animation in seconds. Set to 0 to disable the animation.
ast.target: 幻灯片切换动画的持续时间（以秒为单位）。设置为 0 可禁用动画。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The intensity of the slide transition animation. The higher the value, the more the canvas will zoom out before zooming in on the next slide.
ast.target: 幻灯片切换动画的强度。该值越高，画布在缩放至下一张幻灯片之前会先缩小得越多。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Change the persistent z-index of nodes using the context menu.
ast.target: 使用上下文菜单更改节点的持久 z-index (层级)。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, you can move nodes one layer forward or backward.
ast.target: 启用后，您可以将节点向前或向后移动一层。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Change the aspect ratio of nodes using the context menu.
ast.target: 使用上下文菜单更改节点的宽高比。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically resize the height of a node to fit the content.
ast.target: 自动调整节点高度以适应内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the auto resize feature will be enabled by default for all nodes.
ast.target: 启用后，所有节点将默认开启自动调整大小功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The maximum height of the node when auto resizing (-1 for unlimited).
ast.target: 自动调整大小时节点的最大高度（-1 表示无限制）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the height of the node will snap to the grid.
ast.target: 启用后，节点的高度将贴合网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Encapsulate a selection of nodes and edges into a new canvas using the context menu.
ast.target: 使用上下文菜单将选中的节点和连线封装到新画布中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the background grid will be hidden when in readonly mode.
ast.target: 启用后，处于只读模式时将隐藏背景网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Highlight outgoing (and optionally incoming) edges of a selected node.
ast.target: 高亮显示选定节点的出边（也可选择包括入边）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, incoming edges will also be highlighted.
ast.target: 启用后，入边也会被高亮显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select edges connected to the selected node(s) using the popup menu.
ast.target: 使用弹出菜单选择连接到所选节点的连线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Focus on a single node and blur all other nodes.
ast.target: 聚焦于单个节点并使所有其他节点模糊。

ast.name: label
ast.target: 双击时创建的节点类型

ast.name: label
ast.source: Always align new nodes to grid
ast.target: 始终将新节点对齐到网格

ast.name: label
ast.source: Disable font size relative to zoom
ast.target: 禁用相对于缩放的字体大小

ast.name: label
ast.target: 启用 .canvas 元数据缓存兼容性

ast.name: label
ast.source: Enable support for linking to a node using a [[wikilink]]
ast.target: 启用使用 [[wikilink]] 链接到节点的支持

ast.name: label
ast.target: 显示进入禁用传送门的连线

ast.name: label
ast.target: 默认文本节点样式属性

ast.name: label
ast.source: Update edge style while dragging (Can be very slow)
ast.target: 拖动时更新连线样式（可能非常慢）

ast.name: label
ast.target: 起始端为浮动的新连线

ast.name: label
ast.source: Show "Set Start Node" in node popup
ast.target: 在节点弹出菜单中显示“设为起始节点”

ast.name: label
ast.source: Use arrow keys to change slides
ast.target: 使用方向键切换幻灯片

ast.name: label
ast.source: Use PgUp/PgDown keys to change slides
ast.target: 使用 PgUp/PgDown 键切换幻灯片

ast.name: label
ast.target: 缩放至幻灯片（无内边距）

ast.name: label
ast.target: 演示时使用不受限缩放

ast.name: label
ast.target: 默认开启自动调整大小

ast.name: label
ast.source: Hide background grid when in readonly
ast.target: 只读模式下隐藏背景网格

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将反向链接拉取到画布

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将选中的节点导出为图像

regex.source: error('Style attribute is missing the "key" property')
regex.target: error('样式属性缺少 "key" 属性')

regex.source: error('Style attribute is missing the "label" property')
regex.target: error('样式属性缺少 "label" 属性')

regex.source: error('Style attribute is missing the "options" property or it is not an array')
regex.target: error('样式属性缺少 "options" 属性或它不是一个数组')

regex.source: error(`Style attribute option (${(_a = option.value) != null ? _a : option.label}) is missing the "icon" property`)
regex.target: error(`样式属性选项 (${(_a = option.value) != null ? _a : option.label}) 缺少 "icon" 属性`)

regex.source: error(`Style attribute option (${option.value}) is missing the "label" property`)
regex.target: error(`样式属性选项 (${option.value}) 缺少 "label" 属性`)

regex.source: error(`Style attribute option (${option.label}) is missing the "value" property`)
regex.target: error(`样式属性选项 (${option.label}) 缺少 "value" 属性`)

regex.source: error('Style attribute is missing a default option (option with a "value" of null)')
regex.target: error('样式属性缺少默认选项（"value" 为 null 的选项）')

regex.source: setTooltip("Requires a reload to take effect.")
Notice("Reload obsidian to apply the changes.")
regex.target: Notice("重载 Obsidian 以应用更改。")

regex.source: error(`No migration function found for version ${version}. Critical error!`)
regex.target: error(`未找到适用于版本 ${version} 的迁移函数。严重错误！`)

regex.source: Notice(`Canvas indexing taking a long time for file ${file.path}`)
regex.target: Notice(`正在为文件 ${file.path} 建立画布索引，这可能需要很长时间`)

regex.source: Notice("Metadata node not found or version mismatch. Should have been migrated (but wasn't).")
regex.target: Notice("未找到元数据节点或版本不匹配。本应迁移（但未迁移）。")

regex.source: Notice("No start node found. Please mark a node as a start node trough the popup menu.")
regex.target: Notice("未找到起始节点。请通过弹出菜单将节点标记为起始节点。")

regex.source: Notice("Creating edges with both ends in portals are not supported yet.")
regex.target: Notice("尚不支持两端都在传送门中的连线创建。")

regex.source: Notice(`Core plugin "Properties view" was not found or isn't enabled. Enable it and restart Obsidian.`)
regex.target: Notice(`未找到核心插件“属性视图 (Properties view)”或未启用。请启用它并重启 Obsidian。`)

regex.target: description: "为连线添加自定义样式设置。（访问 GitHub 了解更多信息）"

regex.source: description: "When creating a new edge by dragging from a node, the edge will inherit the color of the node it is dragged from."
regex.target: description: "通过从节点拖拽创建新连线时，连线将继承其拖拽源节点的颜色。"

regex.source: description: "The default color of an edge. The default range is from 0 to 6, where 0 is no color. The range can be extended by using the Custom Colors feature of Advanced Canvas."
regex.target: description: "连线的默认颜色。默认范围是 0 到 6，其中 0 表示无颜色。可以通过使用 Advanced Canvas 的“自定义颜色”功能来扩展该范围。"

regex.source: description: "The default line direction of an edge."
description: "When enabled, the edge style will be updated while dragging an edge."
regex.target: description: "启用后，拖动连线时会实时更新连线样式。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the square path's corners will be rounded."
regex.target: description: "启用后，方形路径的拐角将被倒圆角处理。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the A* path style will allow diagonal paths."
regex.target: description: "启用后，A* 路径样式将允许对角线路径。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the A* path style will be rounded."
regex.target: description: "启用后，A* 路径样式将被倒圆角处理。"

regex.source: description: "Floating edges are automatically placed on the most suitable side of the node."
regex.target: description: "浮动连线会自动放置在节点最合适的一侧。"

regex.source: description: "Allow floating edges creation by dragging the edge over the target node without placing it over a specific side connection point. (If disabled, floating edges can only be created and used by other Advanced Canvas features.)"
regex.target: description: "允许通过将连线拖动到目标节点上方（而不放置在特定侧面连接点上）来创建浮动连线。（如果禁用，则只能通过 Advanced Canvas 的其他功能创建和使用浮动连线。）"

regex.source: description: 'When enabled, the "from" side of the edge will always be floating.'
regex.target: description: '启用后，连线的“起始 (from)”端将始终浮动。'

regex.source: description: "Flip the direction of edges using the popup menu."
regex.target: description: "使用弹出菜单翻转连线的方向。"

regex.source: description: "Create a presentation from your canvas."
regex.target: description: "根据画布创建演示文稿。"

regex.source: description: "If turned off, you can still set the start node using the corresponding command."
regex.target: description: "如果关闭，您仍然可以使用相应的命令设置起始节点。"

regex.source: description: "The default dimensions of a slide."
description: "The padding of the slide when wrapping the canvas in a slide."
regex.target: description: "将画布包裹在幻灯片中时，幻灯片的内边距。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the viewport will be reset to the original position after the presentation ends."
regex.target: description: "启用后，演示结束后视口将重置回原始位置。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, you can use the arrow keys to change slides in presentation mode."
regex.target: description: "启用后，在演示模式下可以使用方向键切换幻灯片。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the canvas will zoom to the slide without padding."
regex.target: description: "启用后，画布缩放到幻灯片时将不包含内边距。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the zoom will not be clamped while presenting."
regex.target: description: "启用后，演示期间的缩放将不受限制。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, presentations automatically request fullscreen. Disable to keep Obsidian windowed during presentations."
regex.target: description: "启用后，演示文稿会自动请求全屏。禁用此项可在演示期间保持 Obsidian 窗口化。"

regex.source: description: "The duration of the slide transition animation in seconds. Set to 0 to disable the animation."
regex.target: description: "幻灯片切换动画的持续时间（以秒为单位）。设置为 0 可禁用动画。"

regex.source: description: "The intensity of the slide transition animation. The higher the value, the more the canvas will zoom out before zooming in on the next slide."
regex.target: description: "幻灯片切换动画的强度。该值越高，画布在缩放至下一张幻灯片之前会先缩小得越多。"

regex.source: description: "Change the persistent z-index of nodes using the context menu."
regex.target: description: "使用上下文菜单更改节点的持久 z-index (层级)。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, you can move nodes one layer forward or backward."
regex.target: description: "启用后，您可以将节点向前或向后移动一层。"

regex.source: description: "Change the aspect ratio of nodes using the context menu."
regex.target: description: "使用上下文菜单更改节点的宽高比。"

regex.source: description: `Change the zoom breakpoint (the zoom level at which the nodes won't render their content anymore) on a per-node basis using the ${VARIABLE_BREAKPOINT_CSS_VAR} CSS variable.`
regex.target: description: `使用 ${VARIABLE_BREAKPOINT_CSS_VAR} CSS 变量为每个节点更改缩放断点（节点不再渲染其内容的缩放级别）。`

regex.source: description: "Automatically resize the height of a node to fit the content."
regex.target: description: "自动调整节点高度以适应内容。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the auto resize feature will be enabled by default for all nodes."
regex.target: description: "启用后，所有节点将默认开启自动调整大小功能。"

regex.source: description: "The maximum height of the node when auto resizing (-1 for unlimited)."
regex.target: description: "自动调整大小时节点的最大高度（-1 表示无限制）。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the height of the node will snap to the grid."
regex.target: description: "启用后，节点的高度将贴合网格。"

regex.source: description: "Encapsulate a selection of nodes and edges into a new canvas using the context menu."
regex.target: description: "使用上下文菜单将选中的节点和连线封装到新画布中。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the background grid will be hidden when in readonly mode."
regex.target: description: "启用后，处于只读模式时将隐藏背景网格。"

regex.source: description: "Highlight outgoing (and optionally incoming) edges of a selected node."
regex.target: description: "高亮显示选定节点的出边（也可选择包括入边）。"

regex.source: description: "When enabled, incoming edges will also be highlighted."
regex.target: description: "启用后，入边也会被高亮显示。"

regex.source: description: "Select edges connected to the selected node(s) using the popup menu."
regex.target: description: "使用弹出菜单选择连接到所选节点的连线。"

regex.source: description: "Focus on a single node and blur all other nodes."
regex.target: description: "聚焦于单个节点并使所有其他节点模糊。"
label: "双击时创建的节点类型"

regex.source: label: "Always align new nodes to grid"
regex.target: label: "始终将新节点对齐到网格"

regex.source: label: "Disable font size relative to zoom"
regex.target: label: "禁用相对于缩放的字体大小"
label: "启用 .canvas 元数据缓存兼容性"

regex.source: label: "Enable support for linking to a node using a [[wikilink]]"
regex.target: label: "启用使用 [[wikilink]] 链接到节点的支持"
label: "显示进入禁用传送门的连线"
label: "默认文本节点样式属性"

regex.source: label: "Update edge style while dragging (Can be very slow)"
regex.target: label: "拖动时更新连线样式（可能非常慢）"
label: "起始端为浮动的新连线"

regex.source: label: "Show \"Set Start Node\" in node popup"
regex.target: label: "在节点弹出菜单中显示“设为起始节点”"

regex.source: label: "Use arrow keys to change slides"
regex.target: label: "使用方向键切换幻灯片"

regex.source: label: "Use PgUp/PgDown keys to change slides"
regex.target: label: "使用 PgUp/PgDown 键切换幻灯片"
label: "缩放至幻灯片（无内边距）"
label: "演示时使用不受限缩放"
label: "默认开启自动调整大小"

regex.source: label: "Hide background grid when in readonly"
regex.target: label: "只读模式下隐藏背景网格"
name: "将反向链接拉取到画布"
name: "将选中的节点导出为图像"
